positive: A majestic portrait of a celestial forest guardian, a blend of nature and magic. The character has iridescent wings and is surrounded by glowing runes and crystalline flora. Cinematic lighting, epic fantasy style, deep jewel tones, highly detailed digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoonish, simple sketch, monochrome
